mapper.select: SELECT ad.id,ad.asn_no,ad.receipt_no,ad.msl,ad.locator,ad.part_no,ad.quantity,ad.`status`, COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(rf.quantity) FROM h_receiving_form rf WHERE rf.acc_no = ad.receipt_no AND rf.part_no = ad.part_no), 0 ) AS receivedQuantity FROM `h_acceptance_detail` ad WHERE ad.receipt_no=#{accNo}

SELECT ad.id,ad.asn_no,ad.receipt_no,ad.msl,ad.locator,ad.part_no,ad.quantity,ad.`status`, COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(rf.quantity) FROM h_receiving_form rf WHERE rf.acc_no = ad.receipt_no AND rf.part_no = ad.part_no), 0 ) AS receivedQuantity FROM `h_acceptance_detail` ad
AND ad.receipt_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bo.receiptNo}, '%')
AND ad.asn_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bo.asnNo}, '%')
AND ad.part_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{bo.partNo}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `h_acceptance_detail` ad
AND ad.receipt_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{receiptNo}, '%')
AND ad.asn_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{asnNo}, '%')
AND ad.part_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partNo}, '%')
